stemHtml: Which statement concerning FMS design is correct?

options.a: The FMS Control Display Unit allows engagement of autopilot and autothrottle.
options.b: The FMS computer combines FADEC and FBW (Fly-By-Wire) functions.
options.c: The FMS computer is the interface between the autoflight system and EFIS.
options.d: The FMS computer integrates performance management with area navigation.
